Name: FMovieSceneTrackEvalOptions
Description: Generic evaluation options for any track

Variables.Name: bCanEvaluateNearestSection
Variables.Description: true when the value of bEvalNearestSection is to be considered for the track

Variables.Name: bEvalNearestSection
Variables.Description: When evaluating empty space on a track, will evaluate the last position of the previous section (if possible), or the first position of the next section, in that order of preference.

Variables.Name: bEvaluateInPreroll
Variables.Description: Evaluate this track as part of its parent sub-section's pre-roll, if applicable

Variables.Name: bEvaluateInPostroll
Variables.Description: Evaluate this track as part of its parent sub-section's post-roll, if applicable
